newCapabilities.name: QCD Color Charge Simulator [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Lattice QCD Monte Carlo simulation for gluon exchange, asymptotic freedom verification, and hadron mass computation from first principles.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { QCDSim } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
const mass = QCDSim.lattice({ quarks: ['u', 'd'], beta: 6.0 });

newCapabilities.name: Particle Collision Analyzer [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Reconstructs collision events from detector data, clusters jets, identifies decay products, and computes invariant mass distributions.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { CollisionAnalyzer } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
const events = CollisionAnalyzer.reconstruct({ cms_energy: 13000 });

newCapabilities.name: Context Persistence Layer [Passive]
newCapabilities.description: Maintains agent context across sessions with long-term memory, conversation threading, and knowledge graph integration for continuity.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { ContextLayer } from '@cmpsbl/agency';
ContextLayer.persist({ sessionId, context, ttl: '30d' });

newCapabilities.name: Neutrino Oscillation Predictor [Passive]
newCapabilities.description: Computes PMNS matrix parameters, predicts flavor transition probabilities over baseline distances, and models MSW matter effects.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { NeutrinoOsc } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
const prob = NeutrinoOsc.predict({ flavor: 'mu', baseline_km: 295 });

newCapabilities.name: Reinforcement Learning Loop [Hybrid]
newCapabilities.description: Tracks agent performance, applies reward signals, adjusts skill weights, and drives continuous improvement via competency scoring.

newCapabilities.name: Cryogenic Decoherence Shield [Hybrid]
newCapabilities.description: Models T1/T2 relaxation times, thermal photon flux, and Johnson-Nyquist noise to optimize dilution refrigerator staging for qubit coherence.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { DecoherenceShield } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
DecoherenceShield.optimize({ stages: 4, base_temp_mK: 15 });

newCapabilities.name: Skill-Based Task Router [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Matches tasks to agents based on competency matrices, current workload, and historical success rates. Detects bottlenecks and re-routes in real-time.

newCapabilities.name: Self-Healing State Machine [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Monitors application state for corruption and automatically repairs inconsistencies using last-known-good snapshots.

newCapabilities.name: Quantum Circuit Optimizer [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Transpiles and optimizes quantum gate sequences for target hardware. Reduces gate depth, minimizes CNOT count, and applies noise-aware routing.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { CircuitOptimizer } from '@cmpsbl/quantum';
CircuitOptimizer.transpile({ backend: 'ibm_eagle', optimization: 3 });

newCapabilities.name: Zero-Trust Perimeter Enforcer [Active]
newCapabilities.description: Enforces micro-segmentation and least-privilege access across every service boundary. Continuous identity verification with trust scoring.
newCapabilities.usageExample:
import { ZeroTrust } from '@cmpsbl/cyber';
ZeroTrust.enforce({ segment: 'api', trustThreshold: 0.9 });

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Dynamic code execution vulnerability
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: eval(), Function(), or exec() detected — injection vector for arbitrary code execution.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Unvalidated request input
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Request parameters accessed without validation. Risk of injection and malformed data processing.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: High cyclomatic complexity (1146)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Complexity score of 1146 indicates too many branching paths. Hard to test and maintain.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: 8 technical debt markers found
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 8 TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers indicate deferred work. ORACLE estimates this compounds into architectural risk within 12 months.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: High dependency coupling (331 imports)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 331 imports detected — high coupling increases blast radius of dependency failures.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Monolithic file (4892 lines)
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: 4892 lines in a single file. ENGINEER recommends decomposition to reduce cognitive load.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: No module exports detected
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Code appears self-contained with no exports. Limits reusability and testability.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: 28 classes in single file
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Multiple classes in one file suggest God Object patterns. ENGINEER recommends single-class files.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Deprecated API usage detected
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Code references deprecated APIs. Structural rot accumulates — these should be replaced before they break.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Insecure HTTP protocol usage
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Non-HTTPS URLs detected. Data transmitted in plaintext is vulnerable to interception.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: No graceful shutdown handler
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Server starts without SIGTERM/SIGINT handling. Abrupt shutdowns may corrupt in-flight operations.

vulnerabilityAssessment.title: Unhandled async rejections
vulnerabilityAssessment.details: Async code without catch blocks. Unhandled rejections crash Node.js processes in production.

errorCodes.resolution: Automatic recovery via FAILSAFE. No action needed.
Verify operation is within policy bounds.

steps: Install the test harness: npm install @cmpsbl/test-harness
Place the restoration-report.json in your project root
Review output — each primitive's hardening is verified independently
Green = hardening active. Red = review the specific primitive section.
